prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 2026年专业热 度显示计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化持续高热推荐，该校理科招生专业涵盖电气类、计算机类、电子信息类等热门方向，对考生有一定吸引力；内蒙古2026年 普通高考总人数约15.4万人，较2025年物理类+历史类合计约11.6万人大幅增长约32.7%，按近年物理类占比约72%估算，2026年物理类考生约11.1万人，较2025年8.37万人增加约2 .7万人，竞争显著加剧2025年物理类本科批375分、特殊类型招生控制线487分，较2024年理科本科一批471分有所下降，反映整体分数分布变化；东北林业大学位于黑龙江哈尔滨，属东北地区；该校在内蒙古招生计划占其全国总招生比例较高，为该校重要生源省份之一，地域偏好因素对报考影响中性。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续后移趋势、2026年计划仅微扩3人、内蒙古物理类考生规模大幅增加约32.7%导致竞争加剧、学校声誉偏负面等因素，预计2026年理科（物理类）最低录取位次在 2025年基准18078名基础上继续后移；预测最低位次约18254名，区间17754–18754名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for science (physics category) were approximately 15460 → 17060 → 17058 → 17201 → 18078, showing a continuous backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 2618 positions over the past 5 years; the 2025 baseline is about 18078, a backward shift of about 877 positions from 2024, with an increased magnitude; the university's enrollment plan in Inner Mongolia for science (physics category) was 218 in 2021, 216 in 2022, 218 in 2023, 217 in 2024, and 223 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 226, a slight expansion of 3 students (+1.35%) compared to 2025, with minimal impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; in the Soft Science Chinese University Rankings, it ranked 114th in 2021, 114th in 2022, 115th in 2023, 113th in 2024, 113th in 2025, and 115th in 2026, with stable rankings in the 113–115 range in recent years, placing it among mid-to-upper tier 211 universities; the reputation evaluation for the 2026 college entrance examination cycle is somewhat negative, mainly involving internal school announcements questioned for teacher ethics and conduct issues; Douyin popularity ranking is 59th (relatively hot), with a comprehensive popularity of about 543,000, and short video exposure at a mid-to-upper level among 211 universities; no significant record of admission gaps; the university's traditional strengths are in forestry engineering, forestry, and landscape architecture, consistent with the positioning of agriculture and forestry institutions.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2026, major popularity shows that computer science, electronic information/communication, and electrical engineering and automation continue to be highly recommended; the university's science enrollment majors include popular directions such as electrical, computer science, and electronic information, which are attractive to candidates; the total number of general college entrance examination participants in Inner Mongolia in 2026 is about 154,000, a significant increase of about 32.7% compared to the total of about 116,000 in 2025 for physics and history categories; based on the recent physics category proportion of about 72%, the estimated number of physics category candidates in 2026 is about 111,000, an increase of about 27,000 from 83,700 in 2025, significantly intensifying competition; in 2025, the physics category undergraduate batch score was 375, and the special type enrollment control line was 487, a decrease from the 2024 science undergraduate first batch score of 471, reflecting changes in overall score distribution; Northeast Forestry University is located in Harbin, Heilongjiang, in the Northeast region; the university's enrollment plan in Inner Mongolia accounts for a relatively high proportion of its total national enrollment, making it an important source province for the university, with a neutral impact on regional preference factors for applications.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend in historical rankings, the minimal expansion of only 3 students in the 2026 plan, the significant increase of about 32.7% in the number of physics category candidates in Inner Mongolia leading to intensified competition, and the somewhat negative school reputation, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking for science (physics category) in 2026 will continue to shift backward from the 2025 baseline of 18078; the predicted minimum ranking is about 18254, with a range of 17754–18754.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 17754–18754, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main direction, Tier 1 majors as a sprint, and Tier 3 majors as a safety net. For rankings significantly better than the lower limit (<17754), focus on sprinting for popular majors such as Electrical Category and Computer Category; for rankings near the upper limit (>18754), prioritize Tier 3 majors to ensure admission. This university is a 211 institution with relatively high cost-effectiveness, suitable for candidates with mid-to-upper rankings.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for liberal arts (history category) were approximately 3353 → 2834 → 2539 → 3857 → 3120, showing significant fluctuations with a pattern of "down-down-up-down"; the 2025 baseline is about 3120, moving forward by about 737 places compared to 2024's 3857, a clear rebound; the university's enrollment plan for liberal arts (history category) in Inner Mongolia was 29 in 2021, 28 in 2022, 28 in 2023, 28 in 2024, and 30 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 27, a reduction of 3 (-10%) compared to 2025, a relatively large reduction, theoretically easing competition slightly (ranking number decreases).

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; the Soft Science ranking is stable in the 113–115 range, placing it in the upper-middle tier of 211 universities; the reputation evaluation for the 2026 college entrance examination cycle is somewhat negative, involving doubts about teacher ethics; Douyin popularity is relatively hot (ranked 59th), with medium-high short video exposure; no obvious record of enrollment gaps; the university's liberal arts enrollment majors mainly include Business Administration, Law, Political Science and Administration, English, Advertising, etc., with no A-level advantageous liberal arts disciplines.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2026, major popularity shows Law is divided and wait-and-see, Chinese Language/Literature is recommended, Teacher Training/Education is divided and wait-and-see; the total number of candidates for the 2026 Inner Mongolia general college entrance examination is about 154,000, with the history category accounting for approximately 28% in recent years, so the 2026 history category candidates are about 43,000, an increase of about 31.7% compared to 2025's 32,600, significantly intensifying competition; the 2025 history category undergraduate batch score is 418, and the special type enrollment control line is 523, a decrease from the 2024 liberal arts undergraduate first batch score of 478; Northeast Forestry University is located in Harbin, Heilongjiang, in the Northeast region; the university's liberal arts enrollment plan in Inner Mongolia accounts for a relatively small proportion, and regional preference factors have a neutral impact.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering factors such as large fluctuations in historical rankings, a 10% reduction in the 2026 enrollment plan (easing competition), but a significant increase of about 31.7% in the number of history category candidates in Inner Mongolia (intensifying competition), the two offset each other, and the ranking is expected to move forward slightly; the predicted minimum ranking is about 2913, with a range of 2476–3350.
